description: Coulson and Simmons, in disguise as Gerald Sharpe and Agent Peggy Carter, gain access to Area 51. They are both amused and nervous as they pass security and marvel at the base's cutting-edge tech. Preparing for their investigation, they banter about their roles and lay out a plan to screen the staff for Chronicom infiltrators using emotional response tests.

transcript.line: Stop it right there. May I see some I.D., please? Alright, go right ahead.
Gerald Sharpe. Sorry I'm late. Roads all look the same out here.
Oh. She's not my secretary. She's my boss.
I think you'll agree I don't need to be on the list.
You're enjoying this way too much, Peggy.
I always dreamed of seeing this place.
Give me an hour, I'll save them decades.
I thought it would be bigger.
The MPs. How do they get to base?
Did anyone enter the base this morning?
We'll need to speak to each of them. Just routine. Couple of questions.
Great. Let's hope our guy starts singing.
